allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('/c/Users/hatfi/OneDrive/Desktop/n8n/package.json'\); console.log\('pkg name:',p.name,p.version\); console.log\('engines:',JSON.stringify\(p.engines\)\); console.log\('packageManager:',p.packageManager\); console.log\('start/dev scripts:'\); for\(const k of ['start','dev','build']\) console.log\(' ',k,'=>',p.scripts&&p.scripts[k]\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('name:',p.name,p.version\); console.log\('engines:',JSON.stringify\(p.engines\)\); console.log\('packageManager:',p.packageManager\); for\(const k of ['start','dev','build']\) console.log\(k,'=>',p.scripts&&p.scripts[k]\);")
PowerShell(ollama --version; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\lib" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)
PowerShell($env:CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=""; ollama run gemma3n:e4b "Say OK" --keepalive 0s 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== cuda_v12 ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\lib\\ollama\\cuda_v12" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== cuda_v13 ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\lib\\ollama\\cuda_v13" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(ollama run gemma3n:e4b "Reply with exactly: GPU OK" 2>&1)
PowerShell($r = ollama run gemma3n:e4b "Reply with exactly: GPU OK"; Write-Output "RESULT: $r"; Write-Output "=== ps ==="; ollama ps)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== ollama ps ==="; ollama ps; Write-Output "=== gpu mem ==="; nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader; Write-Output "=== server log tail ==="; Get-Content "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Ollama\\server.log" -Tail 15)

Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"gemma3n:e4b","prompt":"Reply with exactly: GPU OK","stream":false}' --max-time 600 -w '\\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code} TOTAL_TIME:%{time_total}s\\n')

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== who owns 11434 ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 11434 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)  $\($p.ProcessName\)  $\($p.Path\)" }; Write-Output "=== server responds? ==="; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/version\).version } catch { "no response: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"llama2:latest","prompt":"Why is the sky blue?","stream":false}')
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d.get\('response',''\); print\('LEN',len\(r\)\); print\('RAW:', repr\(r[:500]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('/c/Users/hatfi/OneDrive/Desktop/n8n/package.json'\); console.log\('pkg name:',p.name,p.version\); console.log\('engines:',JSON.stringify\(p.engines\)\); console.log\('packageManager:',p.packageManager\); console.log\('scripts:'\); for\(const k of ['start','dev','build','build:backend','dev:be','dev:fe']\) console.log\(' ',k,'=>',p.scripts&&p.scripts[k]\);")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== node ==="; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; node --version; Write-Output "=== nvm ==="; \(Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== fnm ==="; \(Get-Command fnm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== winget ==="; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "=== choco ==="; \(Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== fnm versions installed ==="; fnm list; Write-Output "=== default node \(this shell\) ==="; node --version; Write-Output "=== pnpm ==="; $p = Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { pnpm --version } else { "pnpm NOT on PATH" }; Write-Output "=== corepack ==="; $c = Get-Command corepack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { "corepack NOT found" })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ec=d.get\('eval_count',0\); ed=d.get\('eval_duration',1\); pc=d.get\('prompt_eval_count',0\); pd=d.get\('prompt_eval_duration',1\); print\(f'GEN: {ec} tokens in {ed/1e9:.1f}s = {ec/\(ed/1e9\):.1f} tok/s'\); print\(f'PROMPT: {pc} tokens in {pd/1e9:.1f}s = {pc/\(pd/1e9\):.1f} tok/s'\); print\(f'TOTAL wall: {d.get\(\\"total_duration\\",0\)/1e9:.1f}s'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ec=d.get\('eval_count',0\); ed=d.get\('eval_duration',1\); print\(f'GEN: {ec} tokens in {ed/1e9:.1f}s = {ec/\(ed/1e9\):.1f} tok/s'\); print\(f'TOTAL wall: {d.get\(\\"total_duration\\",0\)/1e9:.1f}s'\)")

Bash(curl -s --max-time 300 -w "HTTP=%{http_code} TIME=%{time_total}\\n" -o /tmp/ollama_4b.json http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:4b","prompt":"Write two sentences about semiconductors.","stream":false,"think":false,"options":{"num_ctx":8192}}')

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/ollama_4b.json'\)\); ec=d.get\('eval_count',0\); ed=d.get\('eval_duration',1\); print\(f'GEN: {ec} tokens in {ed/1e9:.1f}s = {ec/\(ed/1e9\):.1f} tok/s'\); print\('vram_bytes_in_resp_keys:', [k for k in d.keys\(\)]\)")
